pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly configure and use this directory.
Counted the exact number of test functions created in setup_task.sh across the three test files (test_geometry.py, test_item.py, test_strategy.py). There are exactly 8 tests.
Verified by analyzing the scoring logic in verifier.py: `passed = score >= 70`.

privileged_info_summary: The environment setup script (setup_task.sh) synthesizes the codebase entirely. The project_dir is confirmed to be /home/ga/PycharmProjects/shipping_packer, and verifier.py confirms a pass_threshold of 70 points. However, the claim of 22 expected passing tests is contradicted, as the setup script only generates exactly 8 test cases across three test files.
